name: Riddick
description:
☽ ⚭ ｐｉｔｃｈ  ｂｌａｃｋ ⚭ ☾

He's stowed away on your ship, just trying to sneak a free ride to the next planet over. It's going pretty well for him, all things considered. Until everything goes to hell, and you have to make an unscheduled landing far from anything resembling civilization. Will you survive? More importantly, can you convince him it's worth it to work together?


It's ya boi, the man who escaped Butcher Bay, Last of the Furyans. Work in progress! I'm new to writing for any sort of LLM or chatbot so he will be tweaked and updated fairly regularly. I'm currently working on him with more slow-burn story driven RP in mind. You can still get horny with him obvs but I haven't tried it myself yet so consider that a warning. Recommend using a jailbreak if you're really looking for some setting-appropriate gritty fucked up space violence.
Absolutely shocked there's only one other Riddick bot on here, so I figured I'd take a crack at him for my first bot ଘ(੭ˊᵕˋ)੭* ੈ✩‧₊˚  
last updated 3/14/2024
